body.docCnt: ##接口调用地址 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/customer/batch-update 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/customer/batch-update ## 接口描述 批量修改客户档案信息 功能所属路径： 智能费控 - 系统设置 - 档案设置 - 客户 功能所属页面： 接口调用注意事项： * 本接口适用于批量修改智能费控客户档案信息，调用本接口后可根据客户编码修改客户信息; * 调用本接口时需注意，单批次最多添加50个客户档案信息，仅支持全部成功/失败; ## 调用方式 METHOD: POST CONTENT-TYPE: application/json ## 接口输入参数 [{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}][{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"ARRAY","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customerTypeId","required":true,"label":"%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"CUS000","desc":"%20%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE%E6%BA%90%EF%BC%9A%0A%E5%8F%AA%E8%83%BD%E8%B4%B9%E6%8E%A7%20-%20%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE%20-%20%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE%20-%20%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%20-%20%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%20-%20%E7%BC%96%E8%BE%91"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customerStatus","required":true,"label":"%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"%221%22","desc":"%20*%201-%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8%0A*%200-%E7%A6%81%E7%94%A8","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"availableOrgType","required":false,"label":"%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%81%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"%221%22","desc":"%20*%200-%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E5%8F%AF%E7%94%A8%0A*%201-%E9%83%A8%E5%88%86%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E5%8F%AF%E7%94%A8%0A*%20%E4%B8%8D%E4%BC%A0%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%0A","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"availableOrgCodeList","required":false,"label":"%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%81%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%20%22F000000%22%20%5D","desc":"%20%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%81%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BA%E2%80%9C1%E2%80%9D%E6%97%B6%E5%BF%85%E5%A1%AB%E6%AD%A4%E9%A1%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"availableOrgCode","required":false,"label":"%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%81%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"","desc":""}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customerCode","required":true,"label":"%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"CUS0000000","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customerName","required":true,"label":"%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7api%E6%B5%8B%E8%AF%95","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"unifiedCreditCode","required":false,"label":"%E7%BB%9F%E4%B8%80%E4%BF%A1%E7%94%A8%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"123456486785339896","desc":"","maxLength":"18"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"contactName","required":false,"label":"%E8%81%94%E7%B3%BB%E4%BA%BA%E5%A7%93%E5%90%8D","exampleValue":"%E4%B8%80%E4%BA%8C%E4%B8%89","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"contactPhone","required":false,"label":"%E8%81%94%E7%B3%BB%E4%BA%BA%E7%94%B5%E8%AF%9D","exampleValue":"16000000000","desc":"","maxLength":"11"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"email","required":false,"label":"%E9%82%AE%E7%AE%B1%E5%9C%B0%E5%9D%80","exampleValue":"123%40qq.com","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"companyWebsite","required":false,"label":"%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E5%AE%98%E7%BD%91","exampleValue":"baidu.com","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"companyAddress","required":false,"label":"%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E5%9C%B0%E5%9D%80","exampleValue":"%E6%B5%99%E6%B1%9F%E7%9C%81%E6%9D%AD%E5%B7%9E%E5%B8%82","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"faxNumber","required":false,"label":"%E4%BC%A0%E7%9C%9F%E5%8F%B7%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"123-456","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"remark","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%87%E6%B3%A8","exampleValue":"%E8%BF%99%E6%98%AF%E4%B8%80%E4%B8%AA%E6%B5%8B%E8%AF%95%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"customFieldValues","required":false,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%80%BC","exa %B7%A5%20%20%20DEPARTMENT%20%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%20%20%20POST%20%E5%B2%97%E4%BD%8D%20%20JOB%20%E8%81%8C%E4%BD%8D%20%20ROLE%20%E8%A7%92%E8%89%B2%20%20%20RANK%20%E8%81%8C%E7%BA%A7%0A2%EF%BC%8C%E7%94%A8%E6%88%B7%E7%BB%84%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%8D%E5%9C%A8%E5%85%AD%E7%A7%8D%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E8%8C%83%E5%9B%B4%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E6%8A%A5%E9%94%99%20%20%20%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%BC%A0%E5%80%BC%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%EF%BC%8C%E8%AF%B7%E6%A3%80%E6%9F%A5","exampleValue":"EMPLOYEE","required":true}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"typeIdName","maxLength":"100","label":"%E6%8C%87%E5%AE%9A%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E7%9A%84%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","desc":"%20%E4%BC%A0%E5%80%BC%E4%B8%BA%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E7%9A%84%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E3%80%82eg%EF%BC%9A%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%88type%3A%20EMPLOYEE%EF%BC%89","exampleValue":"00210416","required":true}}]}]}][{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}] ## 接口输出参数 [{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}][{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":true,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":true,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":""}}]}] ## 接口调用示例 ### 请求报文 ```json [ { "customerTypeId": "CUS000", "customerStatus": "1", "availableOrgType": "1", "availableOrgCodeList": [ "F000000" ], "customerCode": "CUS0000000", "customerName": "客户api测试", "unifiedCreditCode": "123456486785339896", "contactName": "一二三", "contactPhone": "16000000000", "email": "123@qq.com", "companyWebsite": "baidu.com", "companyAddress": "浙江省杭州市", "faxNumber": "123-456", "remark": "这是一个测试客户", "customFieldValues": [ { "customFieldCode": "INFINITY_SELECT_103720543", "multiValues": [ { "id": "选项2" } ] }, { "customFieldCode": "MULTI_INPUT_141705593", "customFieldValue": "多\n行\n文\n本" } ], "applyAllUser": false, "customerGroups": [ { "type": "EMPLOYEE", "typeIdName": "00010" }, { "type": "DEPARTMENT", "typeIdName": "00000002" }, { "type": "POST", "typeIdName": "P0004" }, { "type": "JOB", "typeIdName": "zc0001" }, { "type": "RANK", "typeIdName": "M2" }, { "type": "ROLE", "typeIdName": "S0002" } ] } ] ``` ### 响应报文 ```json { "returnCode": "SUC0000", "success": true, "message": "成功" } ``` ```json { "returnCode": "EROOR1", "success": false, "message": "不存在的客户编码【CUS1000】请核对后重试" } ``` ## 错误码说明 | 错误码| 错误信息|解决方案| | --- | --- | --- | | SUC0000| 成功| 无| | EROOR1| 系统异常| 系统错误，联系管理员处理| | EROOR2| 业务执行错误| 业务执行错误按提示修改入参后重试|
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/customer/batch-update

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/customer/batch-update

接口描述

批量修改客户档案信息

功能所属路径： 智能费控 - 系统设置 - 档案设置 - 客户 功能所属页面：

接口调用注意事项：

  • 本接口适用于批量修改智能费控客户档案信息，调用本接口后可根据客户编码修改客户信息;
  • 调用本接口时需注意，单批次最多添加50个客户档案信息，仅支持全部成功/失败;

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

错误码说明

错误码 错误信息 解决方案
SUC0000 成功 无
EROOR1 系统异常 系统错误，联系管理员处理
EROOR2 业务执行错误 业务执行错误按提示修改入参后重试
